name: Cucumber and Mint Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cucumber and cut it in half lengthwise.
2. Scoop out and discard the seeds.
3. Finely chop the flesh of the cucumber and place it in a colander.
4. Sprinkle with salt and let sit over a plate for 30 minutes to allow water to drain.
5. Rinse the chopped cucumber under cold water and squeeze out any excess liquid.
6. Transfer the cucumber to a mixing bowl.
7. Add the oil, lemon juice, and mint leaves to the bowl.
8. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
9. Pour the mixture into a small serving bowl.
Makes 1 1/2 cups.
